title: 12 Volt Quick-Fill Dc Electric Pump
features: Can be used for inflating and deflating
Great for inflating beach toys, dinghys, air beds etc
description: Product Description A powerful electric pump for inflating and deflating an air Mattress, inflatable boat, toys, etc. Suitable for a 12 volt (Car)Connection. This pump has an Air flow of 600 litre per minute. Comes with an adapter and 3 Reducers. Safety Warning Adult supervision is recommended
